name: english-speaking-training-vscode
description: Standalone VS Code speaking-practice cockpit for local EnglishSpeakingTraining files.

englishTraining.pythonPath.description: Python executable used only for optional local progress completion.

englishTraining.timezone.description: Timezone used for daily package dates.

englishTraining.localMaterialsRoot.description: Optional absolute path to a local training materials root that contains prebuilt/. When set, the extension can read local materials from any VS Code workspace.

englishTraining.coachProvider.description: Language-model provider for transcript correction and follow-up generation. Qwen Token Plan is the primary coach; Gemini and Xiaomi MiMo are fallback.

englishTraining.audioUnderstandingProvid.description: Speech input (speech-to-text) provider. Qwen-ASR (qwen3-asr-flash) on DashScope is primary; Gemini and Xiaomi MiMo are fallback.

englishTraining.ttsProvider.description: Speech output (text-to-speech) provider for native-version follow-along audio. Qwen-TTS (qwen3-tts-flash) on DashScope is primary; Gemini and Xiaomi MiMo are fallback.

enumDescriptions: Recommended fallback. GA frontier flash model (1M context), native structured output, low latency.
Strongest Gemini reasoning (still preview); use when you want maximum coaching quality.
GA, cheapest and fastest Gemini; use to lower cost/latency.
englishTraining.geminiCoachModel.description: Gemini coach model (fallback provider). gemini-3.5-flash is the GA default; gemini-3-flash-preview was a deprecated preview and gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview was shut down, so both are removed.

enumDescriptions: Recommended fallback. Google's audio-understanding examples standardize on this GA model.
Strongest reasoning (preview); rarely needed for literal transcription.
GA, cheapest and fastest for transcription.
englishTraining.geminiAudioUnderstanding.description: Gemini speech-input (transcription) model, used only when speech input is set to Gemini (fallback). gemini-3.5-flash is the GA default; the deprecated gemini-3-flash-preview and the shut-down gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview are removed.

englishTraining.geminiTtsModel.description: Gemini model used for native-version follow-along audio. Uses the latest Google AI Studio TTS preview through generativelanguage.googleapis.com generateContent with responseModalities=AUDIO.

enumDescriptions: Firm, clear and steady — reliable default for shadowing and explanations.
Informative, articulate — natural for explanations and coaching.
Clear, crisp articulation — easy to imitate precisely.
Clear female voice — clean enunciation for shadowing.
Warm and friendly — encouraging tutor tone.
Friendly, approachable — relaxed conversational English.
Gentle, soft-paced — good for careful, slow shadowing.
Upbeat, energetic — lively dialogue practice.
Bright, expressive — engaging and lively.
Youthful, casual — younger conversational register.
Even, neutral — steady narration of longer passages.
Knowledgeable, authoritative — confident explainer.
englishTraining.geminiTtsVoice.description: Gemini prebuilt voice for native-version audio (fallback provider). Curated for natural English; all 30 official Gemini voices are accepted if typed in settings.json. Gemini auto-detects language, so every voice speaks English well — the label is the speaking style.

englishTraining.qwenCompatibleBaseUrl.description: DashScope OpenAI-compatible base URL used by Qwen-ASR speech input. Qwen Coach uses its separate Token Plan base URL.

englishTraining.qwenCoachBaseUrl.description: Bailian Token Plan base URL used by Qwen Coach/analysis. Qwen-ASR/TTS keep separate DashScope endpoints and a separate DashScope key.

enumDescriptions: Recommended. Alibaba's balanced flagship-class chat model (1M context); reliable JSON, good latency and cost. The coach forces non-thinking mode for stable structured output.
Faster and cheaper, near-flagship quality, same 1M context and tools. Best when latency matters most.
englishTraining.qwenCoachModel.description: Qwen Token Plan chat model for correction and follow-up coaching. Qwen is the primary coach; qwen3.6-plus is the recommended default. Qwen-ASR/TTS continue to use the separate DashScope settings.

englishTraining.qwenAudioUnderstandingMo.description: Qwen-ASR model for short recorded English speech (DashScope OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions, ≤10 MB / ≤5 min per clip). qwen3-asr-flash is the current best dedicated ASR for English and accented English; keep the default unless you need a pinned dated snapshot.

englishTraining.mimoAnthropicBaseUrl.description: Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan Anthropic-compatible base URL. Used for mimo-v2.5 coach via /v1/messages. Distinct vendor and key from DashScope/Qwen-TTS.

englishTraining.mimoCoachModel.description: Xiaomi MiMo model used for correction and follow-up coaching via Anthropic-compatible endpoint.

englishTraining.mimoAudioBaseUrl.description: Xiaomi MiMo OpenAI-compatible base URL used for speech-input (audio understanding) when speech in is set to MiMo. The endpoint posts to <base>/chat/completions.

englishTraining.mimoAudioUnderstandingMo.description: Xiaomi MiMo multimodal model used to transcribe spoken English when speech in is set to MiMo.

englishTraining.mimoTtsBaseUrl.description: Xiaomi MiMo OpenAI-compatible base URL used for speech-output (TTS) when speech out is set to MiMo. The endpoint posts to <base>/chat/completions.

englishTraining.mimoTtsModel.description: Xiaomi MiMo TTS model used for native-version follow-along audio when speech out is set to MiMo.

englishTraining.mimoTtsVoice.description: Xiaomi MiMo built-in English voice for native-version audio. Uses an explicit English voice because MiMo Default is region-dependent. Mia and Chloe are female; Milo and Dean are male.

englishTraining.qwenTtsEndpoint.description: DashScope base_http_api_url for Qwen-TTS. The extension appends /services/aigc/multimodal-generation/generation.

enumDescriptions: Recommended. Fastest Qwen3-TTS with the full voice catalog, including the premium American-English voices (Jennifer, Aiden, Ryan, Katerina).

Adds natural-language style control via the qwenTtsInstructions field, but does NOT support the premium English-only voices; pairing it with one of those voices auto-falls back to qwen3-tts-flash for that clip.
englishTraining.qwenTtsModel.description: Qwen-TTS model for native-version audio. qwen3-tts-flash (default) exposes every voice and is used for both the realtime-streaming and one-shot paths; qwen3-tts-instruct-flash trades the English-only voices for spoken-style instructions.

enumDescriptions: American female, brand/cinematic quality — the most natural English default (qwen3-tts-flash only).
American young male, friendly and natural — great for dialogue practice (qwen3-tts-flash only).
American male, expressive and dramatic — energetic intonation practice (qwen3-tts-flash only).
Mature female with rich prosody (qwen3-tts-flash only).
Bright, friendly female; sunny everyday-tutor tone (works on flash and instruct).
Gentle, calm female; clear and slow — good for careful shadowing.
Warm, upbeat male.
Soft, encouraging female.
Intellectual, gentle female.
Soothing, relaxed male.
News-anchor male: even baseline, crisp articulation.
Lecturer voice: explanatory, narrative clarity.
englishTraining.qwenTtsVoice.description: Qwen-TTS voice for native-version follow-along audio. This curated list is tuned for English; all 48 official Qwen3-TTS voices are also accepted if typed via Custom… or settings.json. Voices marked 'qwen3-tts-flash only' are unavailable on qwen3-tts-instruct-flash (the extension auto-falls back to qwen3-tts-flash for them).

englishTraining.qwenTtsLanguageType.description: Qwen-TTS language_type sent with speech-output requests. Use Auto for mixed or uncertain language; a specific language usually improves single-language synthesis quality.

englishTraining.qwenTtsInstructions.description: Optional Qwen-TTS speaking instructions. Sent only when qwen3-tts-instruct-flash is selected.

englishTraining.ttsSpeed.description: Playback speed used when generating follow-along TTS audio.

englishTraining.recordSampleRate.description: Sample rate in Hz written by the native macOS recorder. Default 48000 matches built-in iMac/MacBook microphones and avoids AVFoundation's lossy internal sample-rate conversion, which is the main cause of muffled / noisy takes when forced to 16000. Downstream STT (Qwen-ASR / Gemini / MiMo) resamples to whatever the model needs internally, so a higher capture rate is pure quality upside.

englishTraining.recorderBackend.description: Recording backend. macLocal uses macOS AVFoundation through ffmpeg and avoids iPhone/Continuity microphones; webview uses VS Code MediaRecorder; auto tries webview and falls back to native.

englishTraining.preferredMicrophoneName.description: Optional microphone name substring to prefer for recording, for example iMac Microphone. Used by both webview selection and native macOS recording.

englishTraining.blockedMicrophoneNamePat.description: Case-insensitive regex for microphone names the recorder should avoid, especially iPhone/Continuity devices.

englishTraining.nativeRecorderFfmpegPath.description: ffmpeg executable used for macOS local recording.

englishTraining.nativeRecorderFfmpegAudi.description: macOS AVFoundation audio device index for ffmpeg recording, or auto to choose a local Mac microphone while avoiding blocked devices. Use ffmpeg -f avfoundation -list_devices true -i "" to inspect devices.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run typecheck && npm run bundle
